---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero-banner">
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-tag">ISSS608 · Visual Analytics &amp; Applications · Group 5</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">VAST Challenge<br><span class="hero-year">2026</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-desc">Uncovering hidden patterns through interactive visual analytics — built with R Shiny.</p>
    <div class="hero-badges">
      <span class="badge">R Shiny</span>
      <span class="badge">Quarto</span>
      <span class="badge">Visual Analytics</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-buttons">
      <a class="hero-btn-primary" href="https://isss608group5.shinyapps.io/vast-challenge2026/" target="_blank">Launch Shiny App →</a>
      <a class="hero-btn-secondary" href="proposal.html">Read Proposal</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section class="content-section">

  <div class="two-col">

    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-label">The Challenge</div>
      <p>
        As part of <a href="https://vast-challenge.github.io/2026/index.html" target="_blank">VAST Challenge 2026</a>,
        our team is addressing <strong>Mini-Challenge 1</strong> — using visual analytics to comb through TenantThread's internal communications to establish whether they made a deliberate decision to leak the merger information or the system simply broke down under pressure.
        Our goal is to build an interactive Shiny application that democratises data and empowers
        analysts to explore, interrogate and communicate findings visually.
      </p>
      <p>
        The project emphasises <strong>interactivity</strong>, integrating techniques from
        data analytics and visualisation to surface insights that static reports cannot.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="panel">
      <div class="panel-label">The Team</div>
      <div class="team-list">
        <div class="team-member">
          <div class="avatar av-blue">AT</div>
          <div>
            <div class="member-name">Andy Tai</div>
            <div class="member-sub">Group Member</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="team-member">
          <div class="avatar av-green">GF</div>
          <div>
            <div class="member-name">Goh Fangyu</div>
            <div class="member-sub">Group Member</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="team-member">
          <div class="avatar av-amber">JY</div>
          <div>
            <div class="member-name">Jiang Yuxi</div>
            <div class="member-sub">Group Member</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="milestone-strip">
    <div class="panel-label" style="margin-bottom: 1.25rem;">Key milestones</div>
    <div class="milestones">
      <div class="ms-item ms-done">
        <div class="ms-dot"></div>
        <div class="ms-date">Setup</div>
        <div class="ms-text">Project setup &amp; proposal</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ms-line"></div>
      <div class="ms-item ms-done">
        <div class="ms-dot"></div>
        <div class="ms-date">10 Jun</div>
        <div class="ms-text">Proposal published on Vercel</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ms-line"></div>
      <div class="ms-item ms-active">
        <div class="ms-dot"></div>
        <div class="ms-date">1 Jul</div>
        <div class="ms-text">Poster uploaded on eLearn</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ms-line"></div>
      <div class="ms-item">
        <div class="ms-dot"></div>
        <div class="ms-date">4 Jul</div>
        <div class="ms-text">Poster presentation</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ms-line"></div>
      <div class="ms-item">
        <div class="ms-dot"></div>
        <div class="ms-date">5 Jul</div>
        <div class="ms-text">Final submission</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</section>
```
